## Summary

Describe the user-visible behavior and why it belongs in scope.

## Safety and privacy

- System settings changed:
- Backup/rollback behavior:
- Permissions or Keychain use:

## Verification

- [ ] Primary repository verification passes.
- [ ] `git diff --check` passes.
- [ ] New domain/failure paths have deterministic tests.
- [ ] CI and ordinary tests do not mutate real Mac settings.
- [ ] Hardware verification is identified separately from mock verification.

Commands and results:

```text

```

## Documentation

- [ ] README and relevant product/architecture/support/privacy docs are current.
- [ ] ROADMAP and completion evidence are updated if status changed.
- [ ] English and Korean strings plus accessibility behavior are included for UI changes.
